spec.description: UPS shed/recover controller: telemetry freshness, decisions, and raw UPS readings (JHC-501 / JHC-527).

spec.expr: sum by (ups) (nut_dog_ups_source_state{state="healthy", ups=~"$ups"}) * 3 + sum by (ups) (nut_dog_ups_source_state{state="hold", ups=~"$ups"}) * 2 + sum by (ups) (nut_dog_ups_source_state{state="shed", ups=~"$ups"})

spec.title: nut-dog
